sources.title: Time Pass 2005 Dv DRip Charme Leon Silver RG

metadata.Plot: Dagdu Shantaram Parab a carefree guy and son of a auto rickshaw driver quits studies after frequent failures he starts to deliver newspapers door to door and falls for beauty of Prakjakta Lele who comes from a Conservative and strict family headed by her father Madhav Lele.After a glimpse and miss situations Dagdu and Parajakta fall in love.But Dagdu is already in bad books of Mr Lele and can't stand him and to allow his daughter to marry him is out of question.
metadata.Actors: Prathamesh Parab, Ketaki Mategaonkar, Vaibhav Mangale
